title: Notarization
content:
Notarization

This document was signed and acknowledged before me on this ___ day of ____________, 20__, by [name of the individual signing for the Service Provider] as the representative of UltiTool Media LLC., and [name of the individual signing for the Client] as the representative of Florida Luxury Waterfront Properties, who [is/are] personally known to me or [has/have] produced [type of identification] as identification.

State of ______________________

County of _____________________

On this day, before me, a Notary Public, personally appeared [name of the representative of the Service Provider] and [name of the representative of the Client], known to me (or satisfactorily proven) to be the persons whose names are subscribed to the within instrument and acknowledged that they executed the same for the purposes therein contained.

In witness whereof, I hereunto set my hand and official seal.

______________________________
Notary Public

My Commission Expires: ________
